bug.summary: arbiter routed 3 fleet questions to 'fleet' CORRECTLY, but newer wallet sub-lanes (income/net B-141, expense-by-date B-138) had NO fleet guard and answered with personal money.
phrasings: how many drivers in the bolt fleet already exceeded net earning of 4000 sar this month -> personal net (income-spent)
i want net earning in ALL JUNE (after 'fleet numbers') -> personal net
TOTAL NET EARNING PER DRIVER FROM 1ST OF JUNE TILL 28TH OF JUNE -> 'Total expenses on Jun 1: 0 SAR'

fix.primary: CENTRAL execution gate at the top of handleWalletCommand (lib/orchestrator.js): `if (arb && (arb.domain === 'fleet' || arb.domain === 'finance')) return null;` — one decision enforced ONCE for EVERY wallet sub-lane (income/net, expense-by-date, breakdown, total, recent, payment, convert, add, member, ...) and BOTH dispatch sites (orchestrate + orchestrateStream, which share resolveDomainRoute + handleWalletCommand).
fix.v2_flip: resolveDomainRoute now flips the wallet/fleet/finance boundary onto domain-arbiter.classifyAll() (the B-155 registry) behind M8_REGISTRY_CRUD (default OFF). A CLEAR registry winner in {wallet,fleet,finance} REPLACES the arbiter call; a wallet<->fleet money-safety contest ('ask') becomes the clarifier. Same downstream gate enforces it.
fix.consistency: capabilityFallback's _fleetVeto generalised to veto on fleet OR finance too, so its money help-card abstains identically.

behavior_change: PRIMARY FIX changes behaviour (confident fleet/finance now vetoes ALL wallet lanes — fixes the live bug). V2 FLIP is dormant: M8_REGISTRY_CRUD default OFF = arbiter decides exactly as pre-157.
files: lib/orchestrator.js (central gate in handleWalletCommand; CRUD flip in resolveDomainRoute; capabilityFallback finance veto)
untouched: lib/domain-arbiter.js, lib/capability-registry.js, lib/fleet.js NOT modified (per-driver date-range breakdown was backlogged, not built).

asserts: [A] the 3 fleet phrasings -> arb 'fleet' AND handleWalletCommand abstains (returns null)
[B] the 4 working wallet queries (sara last expense / her june total / breakdown / my june spend) -> 'wallet' AND NOT abstained
[C] central-gate truth table: fleet/finance abstain, wallet/neutral proceed
[D] registry V2 flip routes the same 7 rows identically + finance->abstain + contest->ask
[E] write lanes (confirm 'yes', explicit add) not stolen by the gate
[F] M8_REGISTRY_CRUD default OFF leaves arb untouched
tests.regression: adjacent mirror suites still PASS: build152_arbiter, build155_registry, build156_lookup, build151-wallet-fleet-routing, build153_currency, build135-wallet-recent, build136-wallet-member.
tests.node: ABSENT on host -> PS-5.1 mirror + live phone re-test (BUILD157_LIVE_TEST.md). No PS test mirrors orchestrator.js, so these edits cannot break an existing suite.

kill_switches: M8_REGISTRY_CRUD=1 -> enable the V2 registry flip for wallet/fleet/finance (default unset = OFF = arbiter decides).
M8_DOMAIN_ARBITER_DISABLED=1 -> arbiter returns neutral; the per-lane looksFleet backstop still applies (unchanged).
deliberate_deviation: The brief said 'remove the now-redundant scattered !looksFleet per-lane guards'. KEPT them: post-fix they are NOT redundant — they are the NEUTRAL/disabled-arbiter backstop (M8_DOMAIN_ARBITER_DISABLED path + the breakdown ASK clarifier). The central gate owns the CONFIDENT decision; the per-lane looksFleet checks only fire when there is NO arbiter decision. Ripping them out would regress the arbiter-off path. Documented in the code comments.
backlog: Currency filter: 'what is the breakdown on 921 sar' should filter to that currency only (today returns a mix incl. EGP). Handler gap, not routing.
Per-driver date-range fleet breakdown: 'net earning per driver, all June' resolves to fleet but no per-driver-range breakdown exists -> new fleet feature.
privacy_wall: intact — the gate returns null (no LLM); classifyAll runs deterministic (useLLM:false) and would mask amounts even if consulted. No money text reaches an LLM.
vercel: no new api/*.js (12-fn cap respected); lib-only edits.
rollback: revert the commit on feat/b157-wallet-fleet; or set M8_REGISTRY_CRUD unset (V2 already OFF). Primary fix is a single guard line.
deploy: NOT deployed. No push to main without Muhammad's explicit OK. Branch pushed for review.
